nasb.text: therefore, I will deliver My flock, and they will no longer be a prey; and I will judge between one sheep and another.

esv.text: I will rescue my flock; they shall no longer be a prey. And I will judge between sheep and sheep.

cnv.text: 所以我必拯救我的羊，使牠們不再作獵物。我要在羊與羊之間施行審判。

ccb.text: 因此我要拯救我的羊，使他们不再成为猎物，我要在羊与羊之间施行审判。
